name: Alabama Corn Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, sugar, and salt.
2. Stir in buttermilk and beaten egg until well combined.
3. Preheat a well-greased cast iron corn stick pan in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 3 minutes or until very hot.
4. Pour batter into the pan, filling it about two-thirds full.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
